task.title: PHASE-B 第二波 SC-01-T06 · question.created MQ → review-plan 生成 plan+7 nodes → calendar-core 落 7 events

audit_gate: audit.js v1 (含新加 c4b 真 VRT 检查) 五维度严卡 · mock ≤ 5 · 数字对齐 · maxDiffPixels ≤ 500 · 禁 H2/Mock

context.scenario: PHASE-B 第二波 · TC-01.01 步 10 (后端透明) + TC-01.05 (calendar 503 outbox 兜底) · question.created MQ → review-plan 生成 plan+7 nodes → calendar-core 落 7 events
biz_refs: biz/业务与技术解决方案_AI错题本_基于日历系统.md §2B.2 步 10

acceptance_criteria.text: question.created.topic 投递 1 条 · payload {itemId, userId, subject, topic, action, occurredAt} (snake_case JsonAlias 容错)
review-plan-service QuestionCreatedConsumer 消费 → service.createSevenNodes → wb_review_plan 1 条 + wb_review_node 7 条 (node_index 0..6 · strategyCode=EBBINGHAUS_SM2 · ease_factor=2.5 · status=ACTIVE)
NODE_OFFSETS [2h, 1d, 2d, 4d, 7d, 14d, 30d] 写入 next_due_at = baseInstant + offset · 与 spec §SC-01.10 字符级一致
createSevenNodes 后 calendarBatchCreate.dispatch(persisted) → 7 条 calendar_event (relation_type=STUDY · 独立事务)
TC-01.05 · calendar-core 503 → outbox EVENT_CALENDAR_BATCH_CREATE 滞留 · 3 次重试 (1s/3s/9s 退避) → 最终 7 条 event 全部落地 · UI 顶部 toast「排期同步中，稍后自动重试」
幂等: 同 wrong_item_id 重放 createSevenNodes → existsByWrongItemId 闸门拦截 · success counter 不增 / duplicate counter 增 · 不重复落 7 行

test_invariants: TI1: 7 节点 node_index 严格 0..6 · 无重复无缺失 (unique index uk_review_plan_item_node)
TI2: NODE_OFFSETS 与 spec §SC-01.10 + design/arch/s5-review-plan.md §A1 100% 对齐 (任何 offset 改动需 ADR)
TI3: 重放 question.created (同 msgId) → success=0 / duplicate=1 (micrometer counter)
TI4: calendar 失败不回滚 plan (eventual consistency · SC-01-C07)
TI5: outbox 重试到上限 (3 次) 仍失败 → 告警 + 落 dead-letter (不静默丢消息)
key_invariants: 7 nodes + 7 calendar events 最终一致 (不允许 'plan 已建但 events 0 条' 持续 > 5 min)
context.mockup_directive: (后端透明 · 无前端 page · 不需要 mockup)
context.e2e_protocol: DoR C-1..C-6 per dor_c1_to_c6_required · 真 sandbox · 禁 Mock
context.phase_b_wave_1_prerequisites: PHASE-B 第一波 5 page 已 merge main: Capture/Analyzing/Result/ReviewExec/ReviewDone · 可作为 transition 起点

deliverables_definition_of_done: 1. 实现 task per inflight.context.acceptance_criteria + test_invariants
2. 起 backend service + 前端 dev server 真联调 (per primary_services + sandbox endpoint)
3. work_log: coder.md (5 段落) + bugs-found.md (真 bug list)
4. git commit 分批 · hash 全部 git cat-file -e 验真
5. **强制 git add audits/runs/SC01-T06/team-*/attempt-1/ + git commit** (per 上波教训)
rule_6_tool_budget_guidance: PHASE-B 第二波 · transition task 比 page task 简单 · 预计 ~50-70 tool use
